title: Calibrate Markdown complexity budget for the review plan PR
rawUserRequest: 继续推进当前计划文档工单，修复其 PR 暴露的复杂度预算失败；不要启动计划内整改工单。

declaredIntent.summary: Calibrate the confirmed Markdown complexity ceiling so the current plan-document PR can be verified without starting any planned remediation item.

outOfScope: Starting or implementing any planned Conditional GO remediation Work Item
Changing Python complexity, archive-growth, guard, test, or product behavior limits
Merging or closing PR #242 from this supporting Work Item

sources.reason: Confirmed Markdown ceiling that currently blocks the committed 9302-line plan-document PR.
Regression tests prove configured complexity ceilings remain blocking and measured.
Documents the measured ceiling and repayment boundary.

riskAssessment.reason: Only the confirmed Markdown ceiling and its repayment record change; Python, archive-growth, and product behavior gates remain unchanged.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly directed continuation of the current plan-document Work Item and explicitly prohibited starting planned remediation items.

preReviewWarnings: Reviewers must confirm the ceiling is tied to the measured plan PR and that no unrelated complexity metric or planned remediation item is included.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Set .ai/guards/governance_complexity_policy.yaml max.markdownLines to exactly 9302, matching the CI measurement for PR #242, and do not change any other max value.

Add exactly one repayment record for conditional_go_plan_budget_repair|markdownLines|9100|9302, naming conditional_go_review_plan_cleanup as the repayment Work Item and preserving evidence before cleanup.
Run make check-governance-complexity, pytest tests/test_governance_complexity.py, and make quality; all pass while Markdown complexity remains a blocking measured gate.
The branch diff contains no planned Conditional GO remediation implementation and no planned remediation Work Item is started.
guidelines: Keep complexity budgets explicit, measured, and repayable.
Do not use a budget adjustment to authorize unrelated implementation scope.

intent.problem: The current plan-document PR adds 208 Markdown lines that are counted only after the plan is committed, raising the repository measurement to markdownLines=9302 while the confirmed ceiling remains 9100. The Python platform quality jobs therefore fail in the existing governance-complexity regression tests.
constraints: Change only the Markdown ceiling and its repayment record.
Do not start or implement any planned Conditional GO remediation Work Item.
Preserve blocking behavior and do not change unrelated complexity ceilings.
intent.rationale: A measured, narrowly scoped budget reservation is required for the already-authored plan document to pass the same CI gate that blocks it; the final cleanup Work Item must repay or remove the reservation after evidence-preserving link scanning.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The measured plan-document Markdown total is covered by the configured ceiling.
scenarioCoverage.reason: The exact CI measurement is verified by the quality gate; this low-risk policy-only Work Item has no runtime scenario.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: No planned remediation Work Item is started.
scenarioCoverage.reason: This is a workflow boundary verified by scope and branch review, not a runtime scenario.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized continuation of the current plan-document Work Item and requested that planned remediation items not start.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
